calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Request For Default Judgment By Court - Prove Up
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Brandon W. Bender.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Colin C. Claxon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Stars Model Management, Inc., a Calfornia corporation.
Colin S. Claxon, President of Stars Model Management, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Brandon W. Bender.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 18, 2017.
Dismissal as to defendant Big 5 Kicks, LLC was filed on January 3, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant Brandon W. Bender on January 5, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 30, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Stars Model Management, Inc., a Caliofornia corporaiotn, and against the Defaulted Defendant Brandon W. Bender, as follows:

General Damages - $45,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $135,000.00.
Costs - $600.00.

Total - $180,600.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
